title: Core Components
productionRole: Prove reusable editable PPT components for common report pages.

pages.title: Three Metric Cards
pages.takeaway: Metric cards work when the number, label, evidence, and caveat are visible together.

pages.title: Big Word + Card Matrix
pages.takeaway: A big-word matrix turns whitespace into a memory anchor with supporting evidence.

pages.title: Four-Column Mechanism
pages.takeaway: Four-column pages should balance explanation, icon, and conclusion in each lane.
